faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Your guide to pricing and plans with Databayt.

questions.question: What's included in the One Project plan?
questions.answer: The One Project plan includes complete custom development for a single automation solution, including consultation, development, testing, and deployment.

questions.question: How does the hourly billing work for Strategic Partner?
questions.answer: With Strategic Partner, you get access to our development team at $10/hour. Perfect for ongoing projects, maintenance, or when you need flexible development resources.

questions.question: Can I switch between plans?
questions.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.

questions.question: Do you offer enterprise solutions?
questions.answer: Absolutely! For enterprise needs, we offer custom solutions with dedicated teams, SLAs, and specialized support. Contact us for a tailored quote.

introduction.paragraph1: Automate the boring. Databayt is an open-source, Arabic-first software company building the products that run real-world operations — schools, clinics, shops, and homes — one atomic component at a time. Every line of code is open source, every contribution is owned by the person who made it, and every builder helps shape how these communities work.
introduction.paragraph2: We sell the origin of all value — Time, the currency that drives the world. What if you could reclaim yours and focus on what truly matters? It's more than a service; it's an escape from the matrix — a restoration of time through the elimination of repetitive tasks, streamlined operations, and automated processes. Break free. Reclaim your hours.
introduction.paragraph3: The repository of wonders. Think of our codebase as a living library where every contribution becomes part of something greater. From atomic components to templates to blocks to whole products — Hogwarts for schools, Mkan for homes, Souq for shops, Shifa for clinics — we craft the building blocks that power the next thing we make.
introduction.paragraph4: Follow along as we figure this out together — six people and forty AI agents, building in the open. This isn't only about software; it's a collaborative economy where developers, businesses, and communities unite to solve real problems. Every contribution doesn't just help one project — it compounds into a foundation owned by the people who build it, serving the communities the rest of the industry overlooks.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.development: Products - Multi-tenant SaaS that runs schools, rentals, commerce, and care
whatWeDo.automation: Codebase - One open library of atoms, blocks, and templates behind every product
whatWeDo.consulting: AI Engine - A small team that ships like a large one — humans design, AI builds within constraints
whatWeDo.openSource: Open Source - Public by default, owned by its contributors, licensed to keep the commons open

perProject.title: Per Project
perProject.description: Custom builds for partners who need a specific operation automated — delivered on our shared foundation so they ship fast and stay maintainable.

partners.title: Partners
partners.description: Teams outsource product development to us and tap specialized talent for focused work, without standing up an engineering department of their own.

codebase.title: Codebase
codebase.description: Reusable atoms, blocks, and templates do most of the work. Contributors who extend the foundation earn a share of the value it creates — contributors are owners, not labor.

saas.title: SaaS
saas.description: Ready-to-deploy products — Hogwarts, Mkan, Souq, Shifa — sold to organizations with the same needs and funded by the customers who use them, not by venture capital.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We build in the open. Every decision — from architecture to strategy — lives on GitHub, where contributions are tracked publicly and anyone can see their impact. If it isn't written down, it didn't happen.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Humans design the architecture; AI generates within those constraints. Six people operating like sixty, shipping across education, commerce, rentals, and health — configuration over infrastructure, never rebuilding what others already ship.

growth.title: Growth
growth.description: We play long games with long people. Mission over survival, quality over speed, sustainability over hype — so our products stay robust and the value we create is shared with everyone who builds it.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: Every release meets enterprise-grade standards of quality, security, and performance. Community is the moat, and reputation is earned one reliable ship at a time.

design.title: Graphics
design.description: Creating stunning visual designs with modern UI/UX, graphics, and layouts. We bring innovative concepts to life with creative excellence.

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Create a memorable brand identity that resonates with your audience. From logos to complete brand guidelines, we craft visual stories that build trust and recognition.

creative.title: Creative
creative.description: We offer comprehensive creative services including content creation, poster design, and professional video editing. Our team specializes in bringing your vision to life.
